name: Mom's Doughnuts
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons shortening, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the milk.
3. Stir in the baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients, alternating with milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
5. Knead the dough until smooth (about 2 minutes).
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or up to overnight.
7. Preheat a frying pan or deep fryer to 375°F (190°C).
8. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/2-inch thickness.
9. Cut rounds with a round cutter, discarding any leftover center pieces.
10. Fry in small batches until golden brown and cooked through, turning once.
11. Drain on paper towels and let cool before serving.
